prompt: A premium dark nautical dashboard background texture for a professional marine navigation tablet app. Midnight graphite and near-black mineral glass surface, very subtle bathymetric contour-line relief and chart-grid ghosting, satin matte finish, faint cyan instrument glow only at the edges, refined and expensive, no readable symbols, no text, no logos, no ships, no people, no UI controls. The image must work as a quiet app background behind dense widgets.
style: luxury marine instrument material texture, restrained, realistic macro surface
composition: square seamless-feeling background field, evenly balanced, no focal object
lighting: soft low-key studio reflections, ultra subtle depth
constraints: no words, no numbers, no labels, no watermark, no decorative blobs, no high contrast center
